name: historical_notes
Landing in Kent: Compressed Kent landing: Caesar's infantry wade ashore under Briton missile and chariot harassment while the Roman cavalry transports are delayed offshore.

name: ROMAN
column4: form a shielded beachhead from the boats despite the missing cavalry support
column5: secure enough shore to unload the army

name: BRITON
column4: harass the surf line with chariots cavalry and missiles before the cohorts can form
column5: throw the Romans back into the sea
